name: LinkButton
description: Inline text link with optional left/right icons, underline, and 4 color styles. Used as action links inside Alert and standalone as text-based navigation.

style.description: Color — use 'modifiable' to inherit currentColor from parent container

size.description: md = 20px icons / 14px text · sm = 16px icons / 12px text

underline.description: Always show underline. Hover always shows underline regardless of this prop.

leftIcon.description: RemixIcon name without ri- prefix. e.g. 'arrow-left-s-line'. Null/omit to hide.

rightIcon.description: RemixIcon name without ri- prefix. e.g. 'arrow-right-s-line'. Null/omit to hide.

disabled.description: Reduces opacity to 40% and disables interaction

href.description: When provided, renders as an <a> tag instead of <button>
